text.title: Security Testing Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Security Testing methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: SAST scans run on EVERY pull request and block merge on high/critical findings. Manual override requires named approver.
rule.rationale: SAST scans run on EVERY pull request and block merge on high/critical findings. Manual override requires named approver.

rule.statement: SCA dependency scans run on every CI build. Critical CVEs in production paths block release.
rule.rationale: SCA dependency scans run on every CI build. Critical CVEs in production paths block release.

rule.statement: Secret scanning runs BOTH pre-commit (local) and CI (server). Local-only is bypassable; CI-only catches too late.
rule.rationale: Secret scanning runs BOTH pre-commit (local) and CI (server). Local-only is bypassable; CI-only catches too late.

rule.statement: DAST runs nightly against staging (never prod). Findings open issues automatically; severity ≥ high gates the next release.
rule.rationale: DAST runs nightly against staging (never prod). Findings open issues automatically; severity ≥ high gates the next release.

rule.statement: Report names a single security owner accountable for triaging findings. 'security team' / 'devops' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Report names a single security owner accountable for triaging findings. 'security team' / 'devops' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-security-testing.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
